‘to govern or command’ (cf. abhi-rakṣita).

results.rendered_html:
abhirakṣ 1 P.
1 To protect, preserve, keep, guard, help; bhīṣmamevābhirakṣaṃtu  Bg. 1. 10 , 11. 
2 To rule over, govern (as earth &c.); command.
